case_title: KELLY J COYLE VS. THE FESTIVAL NETWORK, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF COYLE, KELLY J AS TO DEFENDANT THE FESTIVAL NETWORK, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COYLE, KELLY J RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE FESTIVAL NETWORK, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $8,875.07 PRINCIPAL, $15.28 INTEREST, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,095.35, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
